title: dodonaea trifida
intro: Dodonaea trifida, also known as the Horse Apple or Native Hopbush, is a small to medium-sized shrub native to Australia and parts of Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Dodonaea trifida include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat wounds. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as infusions and decoctions, are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
